titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5962

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=772 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 21:10:50.719598+00 | translation moa=773 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 21:10:50.728229+00

p.cl: Omnibus has literas visuris uel audituris . Robertus de Prenderghest Salutem .

me dedisse concessisse et hac presenti carta confirmas
se Willelmo de Scremerston’ et heredibus suis pro homagio et seruicio suo et pro viginti quatuor Marcas argenti . sex . bouatas terre cum pertinenciis
in territorio de Prenderghest . scilicet illas duas bouatas cum tofto et crofto quas Robertus Wynd tenuit . et illas duas bouatas quas Willelmus
filius Galfridi tenuit . et illas duas bouatas quas Galfridus filius Waldeui tenuit . et toftum et croftum quod Aldanus filius Waldeui tenuit
et toftum et croftum quod Ricardus filius agnetis tenuit . Tenend’ et habend’ dicto Willelmo et heredibus suis de me et heredibus meis in feodo
et hereditate libere . quiete . et honorifice . Reddendo inde annuatim ipse et heredes sui mihi et heredibus meis septem solidos et nouem denarios
pro omni seruicio ad me uel heredes meos pertinente . Et faciendo forinsecum seruicium quantum pertinet ad sex bouatas terre de eodem
tenemento . Et sciendum est quod hec est prima terra quam dedi uel alienaui postquam terra mea de Prenderghest mihi data fuit . Et
si forte dictus Willelmus uel heredes sui uersus me uel heredes meos in forisfactum inciderint . dabunt pro forisfacto duodecim denarios . et
dabunt de releuamine duodecim denarios . Et ego Robertus et heredes mei omnes prenominatas terras cum pertinenciis predicto Willelmo et
heredibus suis contra omnes homines et feminas warantizabimus et defendemus in perpetuum .

In cuius rei testimonium presenti scripto
sigillum meum apposui .

Hiis testibus Domino Anketino priore de Coldingham . Domino Laurencio terrario . Domino Willelmo de Lindeseia . Thoma de
Nesbite . Ada de Prenderghest . Iohanne filio Elie . Bertramo de Ristona . Ricardo filio Elie . Alano Ridel . Roberto filio Mauricii . et aliis .
To all who shall view or hear these letters, Robert of Prenderguest sends greeting.

me to have given and to have made firm by this present charter, to William of Scremerston and his heirs, in return for their homage and service, and for twenty-four merks of silver, six oxgangs of land with pertinents in the territory of Prenderguest; that is, the two oxgangs with toft and croft which Robert Wynd held; and the two oxgangs which William son of Geoffrey held; and the two oxgangs which Geoffrey son of Waldef held; and the toft and croft which Haldan son of Waldef held; and the toft and croft which Richard son of Agnes held. For the said William and his heirs to hold and to have of me and my heirs in feu and heritage, freely, quitely, and honourably; he and his heirs yearly returning thereupon to me and my heirs seven shillings and nine pence in return for every service pertaining to me or my heirs; and performing such forinsec service for the same holding as pertains to six oxgangs. And it is to be known that this is the first land which I have given or alienated after my land of Prenderguest was given to me. And if by chance William or his heirs incur a fine against me or my heirs, they shall give twelve pence for the fine, and give twelve pence for the relief. And I, Robert, and all my heirs, shall warrant and defend for ever the aforenamed lands with pertinents to the aforesaid William and his heirs against all men and women.
In testimony of this matter, I have applied my seal to the present writing.

With these witnesses: the lord Anketin, prior of Coldingham; the lord Laurence, terrar; the lord William of Lindsay; Thomas of Nisbet; Adam of Prenderguest; John son of Elias; Bertram of Reston; Richard son of Elias; Alan Ridel; Robert son of Maurice; and others.
